cards.name: NIRA-CHAN...? (Warmthaholic)
cards.effect_text: Select a card from the Abyss. Shuffle them face down and place them at the bottom of your deck. Otherwise, you lose the game. Look at the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck, rearrange them in any order you like, and return them to the deck.
cards.effect_text_jp: アビスのカードを1枚選び、裏向きにして混ぜ、デッキの底に置く。そうしない場合、ゲームに敗北する。 相手のデッキの上から3枚を見て、好きな順番に入れ替えて戻す

cards.name: Abduction
cards.effect_text: If the card in the Battle Zone is a (TAIDADA) character, draw 1 card. If you drew a card due to this card's effect, your hand limit increases by 1 until the end of the game.
cards.effect_text_jp: バトルゾーンのカードが（TAIDADA）のキャラクターなら、カードを1枚引く。 このカードの効果でカードを引いたなら、手札の数はゲーム終了まで1枚増える

cards.name: Resurrection of the Dead
cards.effect_text: Return a card from your opponent's Abyss to the bottom of their deck.
cards.effect_text_jp: 相手のアビスにあるカード1枚を、相手のデッキの底に戻す

cards.name: Counterattack
cards.effect_text: Reveal any number of (TAIDADA) characters from your hand, Attack +10 for each. When your HP becomes 50 or less, place this card into your Power Charger.
cards.effect_text_jp: 手札から（TAIDADA）のキャラクターを好きな枚数公開し、その数だけ攻撃力+10。 HPが50以下になったなら、パワーチャージャーに置く
